function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_spi_transfer.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_spi_transfer
description: >
  Verifies SPI0 and SPI1 master-mode operation on mspm33c321a_derivative.
  Tests cover SPI mode 0 (CPOL=0,CPHA=0) and mode 3 (CPOL=1,CPHA=1)
  full-duplex transfers, 16-bit frame mode on SPI0, SPI1 baseline transfer,
  and register smoke test across both instances.
checklist_ids:
  - SPI-01
  - SPI-02
  - SPI-03
  - SPI-04
  - SPI-05
test_names:
  - test_spi0_mode0_transfer
  - test_spi0_mode3_transfer
  - test_spi1_transfer
  - test_spi0_16bit_frame
  - test_spi_reg_smoke
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: spi_slave_model
    type: spi_slave
    connect:
      sclk: spi0_sclk
      mosi: spi0_mosi
      miso: spi0_miso
      nss:  spi0_nss
    params:
      cpol: 0
      cpha: 0
      frame_bits: 8
      loopback: true
  - name: spi1_slave_model
    type: spi_slave
    connect:
      sclk: spi1_sclk
      mosi: spi1_mosi
      miso: spi1_miso
      nss:  spi1_nss
    params:
      cpol: 0
      cpha: 0
      frame_bits: 8
      loopback: true

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_spi
    instance: SPI0
    mode: 0
    frame_bits: 8
    clock_div: 4
    description: Configure SPI0 for mode 0, 8-bit frame, clk/4 prescaler
  - step: 3
    action: spi_master_transfer
    instance: SPI0
    tx_data: 0xA5
    description: Initiate SPI0 8-bit transfer; slave model echoes data back
  - step: 4
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: SPI0
    register: RXDATA
    expected: 0xA5
    description: Read SPI0 RX FIFO; verify echoed data matches transmitted
  - step: 5
    action: apb_configure_spi
    instance: SPI0
    mode: 3
    frame_bits: 8
    description: Reconfigure SPI0 for mode 3 (CPOL=1, CPHA=1)
  - step: 6
    action: spi_master_transfer
    instance: SPI0
    tx_data: 0x3C
    description: Mode-3 transfer; slave model echoes
  - step: 7
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: SPI0
    register: RXDATA
    expected: 0x3C
    description: Verify mode-3 receive data
  - step: 8
    action: apb_configure_spi
    instance: SPI1
    mode: 0
    frame_bits: 8
    description: Configure SPI1 for mode 0, 8-bit frame
  - step: 9
    action: spi_master_transfer
    instance: SPI1
    tx_data: 0x7E
    description: SPI1 transfer with spi1_slave_model in loopback
  - step: 10
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: SPI1
    register: RXDATA
    expected: 0x7E
    description: Verify SPI1 receive data
  - step: 11
    action: apb_configure_spi
    instance: SPI0
    mode: 0
    frame_bits: 16
    description: Reconfigure SPI0 for 16-bit frame mode
  - step: 12
    action: spi_master_transfer
    instance: SPI0
    tx_data: 0xDEAD
    description: 16-bit frame transfer on SPI0
  - step: 13
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: SPI0
    register: RXDATA
    expected: 0xDEAD
    description: Verify 16-bit received word
  - step: 14
    action: apb_read_all_csr
    peripherals: [SPI0, SPI1]
    description: Read all SPI CSRs; verify reset-default values

checks:
  - id: CHK-SPI-01
    checklist_id: SPI-01
    description: SPI0 mode-0 8-bit transfer echoed correctly
    expected: RXDATA == 0xA5
  - id: CHK-SPI-02
    checklist_id: SPI-02
    description: SPI0 mode-3 8-bit transfer echoed correctly
    expected: RXDATA == 0x3C
  - id: CHK-SPI-03
    checklist_id: SPI-03
    description: SPI1 mode-0 8-bit transfer echoed correctly
    expected: RXDATA == 0x7E
  - id: CHK-SPI-04
    checklist_id: SPI-04
    description: SPI0 16-bit frame transfer echoed correctly
    expected: RXDATA == 0xDEAD
  - id: CHK-SPI-05
    checklist_id: SPI-05
    description: All SPI CSRs at both instances read expected reset defaults
    expected: No unexpected register values

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-SPI checks PASS
  - SPI slave models report no protocol errors
  - No APB errors during configuration or data access
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_spi_transfer
description: >
  Verifies SPI0 and SPI1 master-mode operation on mspm33c321a_derivative.
  Tests cover SPI mode 0 (CPOL=0,CPHA=0) and mode 3 (CPOL=1,CPHA=1)
  full-duplex transfers, 16-bit frame mode on SPI0, SPI1 baseline transfer,
  and register smoke test across both instances.
checklist_ids:
  - SPI-01
  - SPI-02
  - SPI-03
  - SPI-04
  - SPI-05
test_names:
  - test_spi0_mode0_transfer
  - test_spi0_mode3_transfer
  - test_spi1_transfer
  - test_spi0_16bit_frame
  - test_spi_reg_smoke
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: spi_slave_model
    type: spi_slave
    connect:
      sclk: spi0_sclk
      mosi: spi0_mosi
      miso: spi0_miso
      nss:  spi0_nss
    params:
      cpol: 0
      cpha: 0
      frame_bits: 8
      loopback: true
  - name: spi1_slave_model
    type: spi_slave
    connect:
      sclk: spi1_sclk
      mosi: spi1_mosi
      miso: spi1_miso
      nss:  spi1_nss
    params:
      cpol: 0
      cpha: 0
      frame_bits: 8
      loopback: true

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_spi
    instance: SPI0
    mode: 0
    frame_bits: 8
    clock_div: 4
    description: Configure SPI0 for mode 0, 8-bit frame, clk/4 prescaler
  - step: 3
    action: spi_master_transfer
    instance: SPI0
    tx_data: 0xA5
    description: Initiate SPI0 8-bit transfer; slave model echoes data back
  - step: 4
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: SPI0
    register: RXDATA
    expected: 0xA5
    description: Read SPI0 RX FIFO; verify echoed data matches transmitted
  - step: 5
    action: apb_configure_spi
    instance: SPI0
    mode: 3
    frame_bits: 8
    description: Reconfigure SPI0 for mode 3 (CPOL=1, CPHA=1)
  - step: 6
    action: spi_master_transfer
    instance: SPI0
    tx_data: 0x3C
    description: Mode-3 transfer; slave model echoes
  - step: 7
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: SPI0
    register: RXDATA
    expected: 0x3C
    description: Verify mode-3 receive data
  - step: 8
    action: apb_configure_spi
    instance: SPI1
    mode: 0
    frame_bits: 8
    description: Configure SPI1 for mode 0, 8-bit frame
  - step: 9
    action: spi_master_transfer
    instance: SPI1
    tx_data: 0x7E
    description: SPI1 transfer with spi1_slave_model in loopback
  - step: 10
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: SPI1
    register: RXDATA
    expected: 0x7E
    description: Verify SPI1 receive data
  - step: 11
    action: apb_configure_spi
    instance: SPI0
    mode: 0
    frame_bits: 16
    description: Reconfigure SPI0 for 16-bit frame mode
  - step: 12
    action: spi_master_transfer
    instance: SPI0
    tx_data: 0xDEAD
    description: 16-bit frame transfer on SPI0
  - step: 13
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: SPI0
    register: RXDATA
    expected: 0xDEAD
    description: Verify 16-bit received word
  - step: 14
    action: apb_read_all_csr
    peripherals: [SPI0, SPI1]
    description: Read all SPI CSRs; verify reset-default values

checks:
  - id: CHK-SPI-01
    checklist_id: SPI-01
    description: SPI0 mode-0 8-bit transfer echoed correctly
    expected: RXDATA == 0xA5
  - id: CHK-SPI-02
    checklist_id: SPI-02
    description: SPI0 mode-3 8-bit transfer echoed correctly
    expected: RXDATA == 0x3C
  - id: CHK-SPI-03
    checklist_id: SPI-03
    description: SPI1 mode-0 8-bit transfer echoed correctly
    expected: RXDATA == 0x7E
  - id: CHK-SPI-04
    checklist_id: SPI-04
    description: SPI0 16-bit frame transfer echoed correctly
    expected: RXDATA == 0xDEAD
  - id: CHK-SPI-05
    checklist_id: SPI-05
    description: All SPI CSRs at both instances read expected reset defaults
    expected: No unexpected register values

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-SPI checks PASS
  - SPI slave models report no protocol errors
  - No APB errors during configuration or data access
